subject: Urgent Request: Software Developer – .NET
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the gaming sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a mid Software Developer with strong experience in .NET. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:
• .NET
• AWS
• Kubernetes
• Redis

Details:
Client: NordPlay
Start: 2022-05-30
Duration: 18 months
Location: Stockholm (on-site)
Rate: competitive (details on request)

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Ida Fredriksson
Account Manager
PeakRecruit
Tel: +46 73 566 78 90
